notes: Core mechanics work well including splitting asteroids, saucer, wrapping, and lives system, but the ship is invisible when not invincible (rendering only draws ship when invincible>0), saucer bullets can collide with themselves, and the green color scheme deviates from classic white-on-black aesthetic.

Looks recognizably like Asteroids and basic controls work, but core logic is flawed because saucer bullets are mixed with player bullets, allowing self-hits and likely preventing the ship from ever rendering after invincibility due to inverted blink logic.
